output:
# Outbound Sales - The Westmore Hotel Dallas

Three cold outreach emails tailored to the Westmore's three highest-fit Dallas segments. American business tone, Sun–Tue availability emphasized, USD pricing.

---

## Email 1 - Corporate Travel Manager (AT&T / Toyota / Texas Instruments)

**Subject:** A Dallas hotel that prefers your weekday teams

Hi {{First Name}},

I lead sales at The Westmore - a 220-room independent boutique in Downtown Dallas, three blocks from the Convention Center. We're built for the kind of weekday business travel your teams already do.

We're holding **Sun–Tue rates from $165 USD** for Q3, with breakfast, Wi-Fi, and parking included on negotiated stays. Most rooms are king or king-suite with workstations and a sofa for 7+ night project stays.

Worth a 15-minute call next week? I'm in CT and can hold space pre-negotiation while we talk volume.

Best,
{{Sender}}
The Westmore Hotel Dallas

---

## Email 2 - Medical Center Travel Lead (Texas Health / UT Southwestern / Methodist)

**Subject:** Long-stay rooms for visiting clinicians - Sun arrivals

Hi {{First Name}},

Quick note from The Westmore Hotel in Downtown Dallas. We're 8 minutes from the Medical District and have built a long-stay program specifically for visiting clinicians, project residents, and recruiting candidates.

- **$159/night** flat for 7+ night stays
- Sunday arrivals welcomed (we run light Sun–Tue and prefer the volume)
- Kitchenette suites, weekly housekeeping cycle, complimentary parking

We currently host {{System}} contractors and could fold {{Team}} into the same rate without an RFP cycle. Open to a quick call?

Best,
{{Sender}}

---

## Email 3 - University Conference Services (SMU / UT Dallas / TCU)

**Subject:** Sun–Tue group rates for visiting faculty and athletics

Hi {{First Name}},

The Westmore Hotel Dallas has 4 banquet halls (max 600 pax), in-house catering, and we hold strong availability Sun–Tue - which is when most of your visiting faculty, athletic recruits, and academic conferences need rooms anyway.

A few quick numbers:
- Group room rate from **$155 USD** Sun–Tue
- Day Meeting Package at **$79/pp** (room, three breaks, lunch, AV)
- Independent boutique - no chain feel, full custom service

If {{University}} has events on the calendar this fall, I'd love to share a one-page proposal. Easiest is a 15-min call this week - I'm on CT.

Best,
{{Sender}}

---

## Send Cadence
Send Tuesdays 9:00 AM CT or Wednesdays 10:00 AM CT - highest open rates for B2B Dallas. Follow up at day 4 and day 11 with the Follow-up Specialist's sequence.
